name: Activiti
description: Activiti — lightweight open-source BPMN 2.0 engine for Java. Embeddable, cloud-native process runtime with REST and Spring Boot integration.

seo.title: Activiti — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: Activiti: Activiti — lightweight open-source BPMN 2.0 engine for Java. Embeddable, cloud-native process runtime with REST and Spring Boot integration.

when_to_use: Embedding BPMN approval workflows in a Spring Boot app
Automating multi-step loan origination processes in Java
Modeling order fulfillment state machines with REST APIs
Cloud-native process orchestration for Java microservices
Lightweight alternative to heavyweight BPMS for Java teams

pros: Lightweight embeddable BPMN 2.0 engine in Java
Spring Boot starter makes integration trivial
Apache 2.0 license with no vendor lock-in
cons: Community momentum has shifted to Flowable fork
Modeling tools feel dated vs commercial BPM
Limited built-in UI for business users
Scaling clusters requires significant DIY work
review.verdict: Still viable for embedded Java BPM, but Flowable is where most active development now lives.
review.best_for: Java teams needing embeddable BPMN engine inside existing apps
review.not_for: Non-Java stacks or teams wanting citizen-developer tooling

lock_in.reason: Apache 2.0 BPMN engine, open standard process format

developer_experience.reason: Java/Spring-centric, docs decent but older ecosystem
